results.rendered_html:
atisaṃdhā 3 U.
1 To deceive, overreach, cheat; tvayā caṃdramasā ca viśvasanīyābhyāmatisaṃdhīyate kāmijanasārthaḥ  Ś. 3 ; kathaṃ mayā brahmabaṃdhuratisaṃdheyaḥ  V. 2. 
2 To prejudice, wrong, injure, encroach upon; mūladvāraṃ nānyairdvārairatisaṃdadhīta rūparddhyā  Bṛ. S. 53. 82.
